body.title: CC UserPromptSubmit hook: prepend pending Igor messages (minion-aware)
body.result: cc_hook_pending.py reads new SHARED channel messages via Postgres, returns them as additionalContext for UserPromptSubmit. Per-session cursor files. CLAUDE_MINION=true bypass. Wired into ~/.claude/settings.json.
body.description: Add UserPromptSubmit hook to ~/.claude/settings.json that reads new SHARED channel messages since last check and prepends them to CC's input. Skip when CLAUDE_MINION=true is set (worker CCs don't get interrupted). Per-session cursor file tracks last-read timestamp. Hook script in lab/claudecode/cc_hook_pending.py queries channel_messages table. Before polling Akien with 'anything else?', CC naturally sees what Igor said since last turn.
